commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
fix(ci): push provenance to triggering branch, not hardcoded main

main is protected (requires Security Scan Summary status check).
Use git push origin HEAD:${{ github.ref_name }} so the provenance
commit lands on release/rc1 when triggered from that branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF for keyless verify-blob identity

The hardcoded --certificate-identity referenced the wrong org
(x0tta6bl4 vs x0tta6bl4-ai) and wrong workflow file (ci.yml vs
ebpf-release-signing.yml). Use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF which GitHub
Actions sets automatically to the exact subject embedded in the
keyless OIDC certificate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): remove explicit SIGSTORE_ID_TOKEN check in keyless signing

cosign uses GitHub Actions ambient OIDC credentials automatically when
the workflow has id-token: write — passing --identity-token manually
is redundant and caused the workflow to fail because the env var was
never explicitly exported.

S2: fix ROOT_PATH para producción

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(5g): mark Open5GS E2E as VERIFIED on live cluster

Full 5G registration and PDU session established on VPS 89.125.1.107:
- Fixed UDR FATAL crash: missing session.name (DNN) in MongoDB subscriber
- Fixed SCP→NRF routing in all NF configs (AMF/AUSF/UDM/UDR/PCF/SMF/BSF/NSSF)
- Fixed NRF address 127.0.0.200 → 127.0.0.10 globally
- Added /dev/net/tun to UERANSIM UE container for TUN allocation
- Fixed conntrack dual-path conflict with NOTRACK + ip rule iif ogstun
- Added NAT masquerade for 10.45.0.0/16 via eth0

Result: nr-binder ping 8.8.8.8 = 0% loss, RTT ~1ms; HTTP via 5G returns VPS IP.
Updates RC1.1 backlog Stream 3: Live Open5GS E2E → [x] DONE.

commit.message:
fix(useVentasCRM): ignore AbortError on navigation to prevent false errors

When users navigate quickly between CRM and lead detail, in-flight
Supabase queries get cancelled by the browser, throwing AbortError.
These were caught and shown as user-facing errors ("Error al cargar
datos iniciales", etc.). Now all catch blocks ignore AbortError to
prevent false error messages during navigation.

commit.message:
SUITE-3033: Fix Slider/Resizable handlers — remove Int32(Float64)

WasmTarget generates broken bounds-checking code for Float64→Int32
conversion (unreachable traps). Pointer handlers now work in pure
Float64 arithmetic with direct style updates.

- Slider: pointerdown/move compute % as Float64, set_style_percent
- Resizable: pointerdown/move compute % as Float64, set_style_numeric
- Keyboard handlers remain pure Int32 (works correctly)
- Zero unreachable instructions in all 4 handler functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix migration: instantiate installer directly instead of from container

During extension enable, the DI container doesn't have the extension's
own services registered yet, causing ServiceNotFoundException. Instead,
instantiate the installer with core services (dbal.conn, cache, config,
user) which are always available.

Fixes avatharbe/bbguild#347

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

user) which are always available.

commit.message:
fix: add vercel.json to handle SPA client-side routing

Without this file, Vercel returns 404 on direct URL access or page refresh
for all routes other than '/'. The rewrite rule redirects all requests to
index.html, letting React Router handle client-side navigation.

commit.message:
Simplify artifact upload glob and include checksums (#215)

## Summary

- The explicit extension list from #214 missed `.sha256` checksum files
that cargo-dist produces alongside archives
- Simplify to `target/distrib/*.*` which matches all files with
extensions while excluding the raw directories (which have no extension)

## Test plan

- Re-run the release workflow and verify all artifacts (archives,
checksums, installers) upload successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: report delivery path schema + PDF failure resilience

- _copy_cached_to_order() now returns the canonical cache path instead
  of creating order-specific copies. This aligns DB report_path with
  GCS structure so fallback downloads work after redeployment.
- PDF generation failure no longer aborts the pipeline — markdown
  reports are saved and uploaded to GCS regardless. PDFs will be
  generated on Railway where WeasyPrint is available.

commit.message:
feat: add avatar, status, block, push notifications, streaks, FoF, trails, and area exploration

New SDK features:
- Avatar upload/delete via Supabase Storage
- Status emoji with optional expiry
- Block/unblock users (auto-removes friend relationship)
- Push notification subscription management + notification preferences
- Friend streak tracking (auto-recorded on chat/reaction/bump)
- Friends-of-friends discovery via DB function
- Trail recording with distance-based sampling
- Visited cell tracking with geohash-based area exploration
- Area ranking (global + friend-scoped)
- Share rule expiry management + DB cleanup function

DB changes:
- New tables: blocked_users, push_subscriptions, notification_preferences, friend_streaks, visited_cells
- New columns on profiles: status_emoji, status_text, status_expires_at
- New functions: encode_geohash, record_interaction, get_friends_of_friends, get_area_rankings, cleanup_expired_share_rules
- New trigger: auto-record visited cells on location update
- New view: visited_cell_stats
- RLS policies for all new tables

Frontend:
- Trail layer with demo mode (TrailLayer.tsx)
- 3-state trail toggle (off/demo/live)
- M3 glass refraction CSS effects
- sendLocationWithTrail integration in Map.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Merge: Exnessスプレッドをfxfan.club実測値に更新（2026.3.8）

* IS/OOS分割検証結果

F1+F3フィルター（UTC5〜15時 + 1H優先）の5銘柄IS/OOS分割バックテスト

【条件】
- 銘柄: EURUSD / GBPUSD / AUDUSD / USDCHF / EURGBP
- 固定ロット2% / RR=2.5 / 半利確+1R
- IS期間: 2024-07-01 〜 2025-03-31
- OOS期間: 2025-04-01 〜 2026-02-27

【結果（5銘柄合算）】
- IS:  件数1229 PF=2.26 勝率32.3% シャープ4.76  月次黒字89%
- OOS: 件数2902 PF=2.28 勝率32.5% シャープ15.54 月次黒字100%

【判定】★ PASS ★（OOS PF≥1.5 かつ 月次黒字≥70%）

https://claude.ai/code/session_011hFmDBu7pxieSYtPYpF1W2

* IS/OOS分割検証結果（貴金属・株価指数）

F1+F3フィルター（UTC5〜15時 + 1H優先）の5銘柄IS/OOS分割バックテスト

【対象銘柄・結果】
XAUUSD  IS: PF=1.06  OOS: PF=2.00 勝率28.0% 月次黒字73%  → OOS単体 PASS
XAGUSD  IS: PF=8.77  OOS: PF=1.86 勝率29.0% 月次黒字82%  → OOS単体 PASS  ※15m使用
NAS100  IS: PF=0.10  OOS: PF=0.20 勝率25.9% 月次黒字 0%  → FAIL（スプレッド53.8pt）
US30    IS: PF=1.90  OOS: PF=1.12 勝率22.4% 月次黒字50%  → FAIL
US500   IS: PF=2.00  OOS: PF=1.03 勝率22.1% 月次黒字36%  → FAIL

【5銘柄合算判定】✗ FAIL
OOS PF=0.87（基準≥1.5） / 月次黒字36%（基準≥70%）

【考察】
- 貴金属（XAUUSD/XAGUSD）はF1+F3戦略と相性良好
- NAS100はスプレッド53.8ptが障壁（本戦略には不向き）
- 株価指数（US30/US500）はOOS期間に勝率が低下

【データ準備】
- fetch_missing_data.py で NAS100/US30/SPX500 の IS/OOS 1h キャッシュを作成
- XAGUSD 1mデータ未取得（APIキー未設定）→ 15mで代替

https://claude.ai/code/session_011hFmDBu7pxieSYtPYpF1W2

* fix: スプレッドをfxfan.club実測値に更新（2026.3.8）

- XAUUSD: 0.90 → 5.2 pips（ロースプレッド口座 平均）
- XAGUSD: 0.40 → 2.6 pips（ロースプレッド口座 平均）
- NAS100: 53.8 → 8.3 pips（ゼロ口座 平均）
- US30:   0.0  → 0.8 pips（ゼロ口座 平均）
- SPX500: 0.2  → 0.1 pips（ゼロ口座 平均）

出典: https://www.fxfan.club/?p=59656

https://claude.ai/code/session_011hFmDBu7pxieSYtPYpF1W2

* results: NAS100バックテスト結果更新（スプレッド8.3pips適用後）

NAS100 IS PF=0.48, OOS PF=1.04 → FAIL
XAUUSD OOS PF=1.99, XAGUSD OOS PF=1.76 は基準クリア

https://claude.ai/code/session_011hFmDBu7pxieSYtPYpF1W2

feat: wire all frontend components to Payload CMS

commit.message:
feat(quantconnect): optimize 5 strategies + import 4 ESGF strategies + research notebooks

Batch optimization iter4: 12 strategies researched, 5 improved, 6 reverted (degraded on QC cloud).

Improvements kept:
- ForexCarry v4.0: IR momentum + skip-month (Sharpe -0.669 -> -0.324)
- AllWeather v4.0: eliminate TLT, IEF 40% + XLP 10% (Sharpe 0.482 -> 0.520, MaxDD 17.0%)
- MomentumStrategy v4.0: per-position -10% stop-loss (Sharpe 0.459 -> 0.472, MaxDD 25.8%)
- EMA-Cross-Crypto v2.0: SMA200 filter + trailing stop 10% (MaxDD 49.8% -> 33.1%)
- EMA-Cross-Index v2.0: EMA 20/60 + 3d cooldown (Sharpe 0.384 -> 0.470)

ESGF strategies imported to projects/:
- Trend-Following (Sharpe 2.157), CSharp-BTC-EMA-Cross (1.094)
- Options-VGT (0.892), CSharp-CTG-Momentum (0.507)

Research notebooks added/updated for all 12 strategies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add missing validations, dynamic text X calculation, and clip size CLI args

- Add dynamic X coordinate calculation for reference TextItem
  (X = imageX - imageWidth * zoom / 100 / 2) per design spec
- Add --clip-width/--clip-height CLI arguments for configurable
  clipping area dimensions
- Add input validations: photos dir existence, image ID type
  conflict detection, photo file pre-check warnings
- Add VoiceItem 0 count warning
- Add CSV/ymmp serif count consistency check
- Add low match rate warning (< 50%)
- Show explicit uninserted count for --max-generate limit
- Add tests for TextItem X coordinate calculation

repository.name: awake
repository.description: Awake is a native macOS menu bar app that keeps your Mac awake for a chosen duration while surfacing managed-device policies that may still interrupt your session. It is built for Apple Silicon Macs running macOS 15+ and is especially useful for long-running local work such as AI agents, builds, downloads, and unattended tasks.
